sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Turn-based Grid Combat
special_mechanics.description: Characters move and perform actions on a 7x7 grid battlefield during turn-based encounters. Not traditional platformer movement.

special_mechanics.name: Exploration Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Overworld and dungeon navigation with scenario-specific twists including stealth mechanics and environmental puzzles.

tier_notes: Live A Live is primarily a turn-based tactical RPG with grid-based combat, not a platformer. Available sources (TCRF and Wikipedia) contain no platformer movement physics data. Movement occurs on a 7x7 grid in battle and through overworld/dungeon exploration, but quantitative physics parameters are not documented. This is a T2 classification based on available documentation being qualitative only, with no precise movement parameters available.
sources_used: TCRF - Live A Live disambiguation page
Wikipedia - Live A Live gameplay and mechanics sections
